Login user or admin and receive API token

role.description: 'user' or 'admin' (admin users can also authenticate via this endpoint)

category_id: The selected category id is invalid for the current workspace.

to_category_id: The selected to category id is invalid for the current workspace.

get.summary: List workspace category sharing management flags

patch.summary: Share or unshare a category in workspace
Activate or deactivate a shared category in workspace

post.summary: Bulk share or unshare categories in workspace

get.summary: List valid categories for transactional flows in a workspace
List user categories with current shared workspaces
get.description: Returns categories owned by the authenticated user. The `linked_workspaces` summary only includes current shared workspace pivots (`is_shared=true`); historical read-only pivots (`is_shared=false`) are excluded.

post.summary: Create a category owned by the current user

put.summary: Update a category owned by the current user

delete.summary: Delete a category owned by the current user

example.message: The category is in use and cannot be removed.

patch.summary: Synchronize the workspaces linked to a personal category
Toggle the default flag on a personal category
patch.description: Toggles the `is_default` flag on a category owned by the current user. If the category was already the default, it is unmarked (and no category will be default after the call). If it was not, it becomes the sole default for that user and any previous default is unmarked. There is no request body.

get.summary: List user payment methods with current shared workspaces
get.description: Returns payment methods owned by the authenticated user. The `linked_workspaces` summary only includes current shared workspace pivots (`is_shared=true`); historical read-only pivots (`is_shared=false`) are excluded.

post.summary: Create a payment method owned by the current user in their default workspace

example.message: The user does not have a default workspace to create payment methods in.

get.summary: List workspace payment methods management flags

example.message: You do not have permission to access this resource.

post.summary: Create and link a user payment method from a workspace

last_4_digits: The last 4 digits field must be 4 digits.

patch.summary: Link or unlink a payment method in a workspace

is_linked: The is linked field must be true or false.
method_id: The method id field must be a valid UUID.

post.summary: Bulk link or unlink workspace payment methods

get.summary: List valid payment methods for transactional flows in a workspace

put.summary: Update a payment method owned by the current user
put.description: Updates the user-owned payment method identified by {paymentMethod}. The route parameter must belong to the authenticated user; otherwise a 404 `user_payment_method_not_found` is returned. The link pivot (is_shared, is_active) is NOT modified by this endpoint. The default_workspace resolution used by POST /user/payment-methods does not apply here because the method is already attached to a workspace.

example.message: Your email address is not verified.
The requested personal payment method was not found.

name: The name field is required.
last_4_digits: The last 4 digits field must be 4 digits.

delete.summary: Delete a payment method owned by the current user

example.message: The requested personal payment method was not found.
The payment method is in use and cannot be removed.

patch.summary: Synchronize the workspaces linked to a personal payment method

request_id.description: Echoes the sanitized X-Request-Id header when provided, or a generated identifier for API requests.

meta.description: Optional domain-specific metadata returned by some business errors.

fieldErrors.description: Present on validation failures and keyed by request field path.

users.0.email: The users.0.email must be a valid email address.
